zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Drogo Drury於大約1080年出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 安德 蕾托 霍尼亞斯霍爾瑟可洛福特時，他的父親Walter Drury of Horningsheath34歲，母親Miss Livermore12歲。他至少有3個兒子。他去世在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Drogo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain meaning and derivation. Norman given names are most often of Continental Germanic derivation, and this one is possibly ultimately from Old Saxon drog ‘ghost, phantom’, or perhaps from Old High German tragen ‘to carry’. However, most plausible is the suggestion that it was brought into Germanic from Slavic as a short form of a name formed with dorogo ‘dear’.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Drogo Drury was born about 1080, in Horsecroft, Great and Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, England, his father, Walter Drury of Horningsheath, was 34 and his mother, Miss Livermore, was 12. He had at least 3 sons. He died in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Drogo Drury è nato il circa 1080 nel Horsecroft, Great and Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Walter Drury of Horningsheath, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Miss Livermore, aveva 12 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli. Morì nel London, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Drogo Drury(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 수폴크 그리트 앤드 리틀 호른잉셰앳h 호르세크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Drury of Horningsheath(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Miss Livermore(은)는 12세였다. 그는 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 런던에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Drogo Drury родился около 1080 г. в местности хаурсекрофт, грит анд литл хаурнингшит, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Drury of Horningsheath было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Miss Livermore, 12. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в местности Лондон, Англия.
